creator: b.shertenlieb@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to mew14930xvi from comment #3)

This is not something that was added by a maintainer, this file was (is) supplied by the developers at Plex.tv...

Since I do not use hardware transcoding on my system, I'm not sure if it's still broken or if it is supported again in the FreeBSD version... I tried contacting someone on Plex's forum when support for hardware transcoding was removed and asked them to update the package message but never got a response... I guess I could try again but I'm not going to hold my breath waiting for an answer...

While I agree with you that the package message is dated, I don't believe it is a reason to hold up an update to a newer version... I will do my best to try to get Plex to update the package message in some future release...

Ben
